title: O God, Great Father, Lord and King!

verses.text: Thy cov’nant kindness did of old our fathers and their seed enfold; that ancient promise standeth sure, and shall while heav’n and earth endure.
Look down upon us while we pray and visit us in grace today; these little ones thou didst receive, thy precious promise we believe.
They now the outward sign receive; wilt thou thy Holy Spirit give, and keep and help them by thy pow’r in ev’ry hard and trying hour.
Guide thou their feet in holy ways, Shine on them thro’ the darkest days; Uphold them ‘til their life be past and bring them all to heav’n at last.
